svg.title: Phase 2 — real-time architecture
svg.desc: Data flow from driver location publish through Redis Pub/Sub to WebSocket fan-out to multiple subscribed clients

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a driver publish location updates in the delivery platform?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI location endpoint do in Phase 2?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis Pub/Sub work for location broadcasting?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a WebSocket connection manager in FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('How does a customer client subscribe to live tracking via WebSocket?')
sendPrompt('How does an ops dashboard subscribe to live driver locations?')
sendPrompt('How can a merchant app subscribe to delivery updates?')
sendPrompt('What are Redis Streams used for in Phase 2 of the delivery platform?')
sendPrompt('What is the WebSocket endpoint URL for live tracking?')
sendPrompt('What is the WebSocket endpoint for fleet-wide live locations?')
